input.backends: [union(if(contains(variables('region0Deployments'), variables('allDeploymentNames')[copyIndex('aoaiBackendPoolConfigs')]), createArray(createObject('backendId', format('aoai-{0}', parameters('openAILocations')[0].abbreviation), 'priority', coalesce(tryGet(parameters('openAILocations')[0].deployments[indexOf(variables('region0Deployments'), variables('allDeploymentNames')[copyIndex('aoaiBackendPoolConfigs')])], 'priority'), 1))), createArray()), union(if(contains(variables('region1Deployments'), variables('allDeploymentNames')[copyIndex('aoaiBackendPoolConfigs')]), createArray(createObject('backendId', format('aoai-{0}', parameters('openAILocations')[1].abbreviation), 'priority', coalesce(tryGet(parameters('openAILocations')[1].deployments[indexOf(variables('region1Deployments'), variables('allDeploymentNames')[copyIndex('aoaiBackendPoolConfigs')])], 'priority'), 2))), createArray()), if(contains(variables('region2Deployments'), variables('allDeploymentNames')[copyIndex('aoaiBackendPoolConfigs')]), createArray(createObject('backendId', format('aoai-{0}', parameters('openAILocations')[2].abbreviation), 'priority', coalesce(tryGet(parameters('openAILocations')[2].deployments[indexOf(variables('region2Deployments'), variables('allDeploymentNames')[copyIndex('aoaiBackendPoolConfigs')])], 'priority'), 3))), createArray())))]

variables.$fxv#0:
<policies>
    <inbound>
        <base />

        <!-- Set the backend and auth-->
        <authentication-managed-identity resource="https://cognitiveservices.azure.com" client-id="{{managed-identity-client-id}}" />
        
        <!-- Extract deployment name from URL path -->
        <set-variable name="deploymentName" value="@{
            string deploymentName = "N/A";
            
            try
            {
                // Extract deployment name from URL path
                // Format: /openai/deployments/{deployment-id}/...
                var path = context.Request.Url.Path;
                var segments = path.Split(new[] { '/' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
                
                for (int i = 0; i < segments.Length - 1; i++)
                {
                    if (segments[i] == "deployments")
                    {
                        deploymentName = System.Uri.UnescapeDataString(segments[i + 1]);
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
            catch { }
            
            return deploymentName;
        }" />
        
        <!-- Set backend pool using deployment name with dots replaced by '-dot-' and spaces removed -->
        <set-variable name="backendId" value="@{
            var deployment = (string)context.Variables["deploymentName"];
            return deployment == "N/A" ? "aoai-default-backend" : "pool-" + deployment.Replace(".", "-dot-").Replace(" ", "");
        }" />
        
        <set-backend-service id="apim-generated-policy" backend-id="@((string)context.Variables["backendId"])" />
        
        <!-- Add /openai prefix to the request path -->
        <rewrite-uri template="@{return "/openai" + context.Request.Url.Path;}" />

        <!-- Check if streaming is enabled and inject stream_options -->
        <choose>
            <when condition="@(context.Request.Body.As<JObject>(preserveContent: true)?["stream"]?.Value<bool>() == true)">
                <!-- Streaming is enabled - inject stream_options to include usage -->
                <set-body>@{
                    var body = context.Request.Body.As<JObject>(preserveContent: true);
                    
                    // Add stream_options with include_usage: true
                    if (body["stream_options"] == null)
                    {
                        body["stream_options"] = new JObject();
                    }
                    ((JObject)body["stream_options"])["include_usage"] = true;
                    
                    return body.ToString();
                }</set-body>
            </when>
        </choose>
        
        <!-- Store whether this is a streaming request for later use -->
        <set-variable name="isStreaming" value="@(context.Request.Body.As<JObject>(preserveContent: true)?["stream"]?.Value<bool>() == true)" />
        
        <!-- Emit Azure OpenAI token metrics to Application Insights -->
        <azure-openai-emit-token-metric namespace="AzureOpenAI">
            <dimension name="API ID" />
            <dimension name="Deployment" value="@((string)context.Variables["deploymentName"])" />
            <dimension name="Streaming" value="@(((bool)context.Variables["isStreaming"]).ToString())" />
            <dimension name="Request ID" value="@(context.RequestId.ToString())" />
        </azure-openai-emit-token-metric>
    </inbound>
    
    <backend>
        <retry condition="@(context.Response.StatusCode == 429)" count="2" interval="1" first-fast-retry="true">
            <forward-request />
        </retry>
    </backend>
    
    <outbound>
        <base />
    </outbound>
    
    <on-error>
        <base />
        <trace source="AIUsageCapture" severity="error">@{
            return string.Format("Error capturing AI usage: {0}", context.LastError.Message);
        }</trace>
    </on-error>
</policies>
variables.$fxv#1:
<policies>
    <inbound>
        <base />

        <!-- Set the backend and auth-->
        <authentication-managed-identity resource="https://cognitiveservices.azure.com" client-id="{{managed-identity-client-id}}" />
        
        <!-- Extract deployment name from request body -->
        <set-variable name="deploymentName" value="@{
            string deploymentName = "N/A";
            
            try
            {
                // Extract model/deployment name from request body
                // Format: { "model": "deployment-name", ... }
                var body = context.Request.Body.As<JObject>(preserveContent: true);
                if (body != null && body["model"] != null)
                {
                    deploymentName = body["model"].Value<string>();
                }
            }
            catch { }
            
            return deploymentName;
        }" />
        
        <!-- Set backend pool using deployment name with dots replaced by '-dot-' (same pools as Azure OpenAI API) -->
        <set-variable name="backendId" value="@{
            var deployment = (string)context.Variables["deploymentName"];
            return deployment == "N/A" ? "aoai-default-backend" : "pool-" + deployment.Replace(".", "-dot-").Replace(" ", "");
        }" />
        
        <set-backend-service id="apim-generated-policy" backend-id="@((string)context.Variables["backendId"])" />
        
        <!-- Add /openai/v1 prefix to the request path (Foundry natively supports /openai/v1 endpoint) -->
        <rewrite-uri template="@{return "/openai/v1" + context.Request.Url.Path;}" />

        <!-- Check if streaming is enabled and inject stream_options -->
        <choose>
            <when condition="@(context.Request.Body.As<JObject>(preserveContent: true)?["stream"]?.Value<bool>() == true)">
                <!-- Streaming is enabled - inject stream_options to include usage -->
                <set-body>@{
                    var body = context.Request.Body.As<JObject>(preserveContent: true);
                    
                    // Add stream_options with include_usage: true
                    if (body["stream_options"] == null)
                    {
                        body["stream_options"] = new JObject();
                    }
                    ((JObject)body["stream_options"])["include_usage"] = true;
                    
                    return body.ToString();
                }</set-body>
            </when>
        </choose>
        
        <!-- Store whether this is a streaming request for later use -->
        <set-variable name="isStreaming" value="@(context.Request.Body.As<JObject>(preserveContent: true)?["stream"]?.Value<bool>() == true)" />
        
        <!-- Emit Azure OpenAI token metrics to Application Insights -->
        <azure-openai-emit-token-metric namespace="AzureOpenAI">
            <dimension name="API ID" />
            <dimension name="Deployment" value="@((string)context.Variables["deploymentName"])" />
            <dimension name="Streaming" value="@(((bool)context.Variables["isStreaming"]).ToString())" />
            <dimension name="Request ID" value="@(context.RequestId.ToString())" />
        </azure-openai-emit-token-metric>
    </inbound>
    
    <backend>
        <retry condition="@(context.Response.StatusCode == 429)" count="2" interval="1" first-fast-retry="true">
            <forward-request />
        </retry>
    </backend>
    
    <outbound>
        <base />
    </outbound>
    
    <on-error>
        <base />
        <trace source="AIUsageCapture" severity="error">@{
            return string.Format("Error capturing AI usage: {0}", context.LastError.Message);
        }</trace>
    </on-error>
</policies>

variables.cognitiveRule: [if(equals(length(parameters('allowedCognitivePrivateEndpointIps')), 0), createObject('name', 'allow-cognitive-services-outbound', 'properties', createObject('description', 'Phase 1: Allow outbound to Cognitive Services via service tag', 'protocol', 'Tcp', 'sourcePortRange', '*', 'destinationPortRange', '443', 'sourceAddressPrefix', 'VirtualNetwork', 'destinationAddressPrefix', 'CognitiveServicesFrontend', 'access', 'Allow', 'priority', 120, 'direction', 'Outbound')), createObject('name', 'allow-cognitive-private-outbound', 'properties', createObject('description', 'Phase 2: Restrict outbound to private endpoint IPs', 'protocol', 'Tcp', 'sourcePortRange', '*', 'destinationPortRange', '443', 'sourceAddressPrefix', 'VirtualNetwork', 'destinationAddressPrefixes', parameters('allowedCognitivePrivateEndpointIps'), 'access', 'Allow', 'priority', 120, 'direction', 'Outbound')))]
